column1: # This file contains monthly cost projections for different user scales
# User Activity Assumptions (per user per month)
# 1. Switch vision to Gemini Flash (80% savings)
# 2. Use GPT-4o-mini for 80% of chat (90% savings)
# Food vision: Gemini Flash instead of GPT-4o (80% cheaper)
KV_COST_OPS_OPT=$(echo "scale=2; $KV_COST_OPS * 0.9" | bc -l)  # 10% fewer ops from caching
echo "  Hybrid (10% basic + 3% pro): \$$(echo "scale=0; 1000*0.1*10 + 1000*0.03*20" | bc -l) revenue"
echo "Break-even paying users needed: \$$(echo "scale=0; $TOTAL_OPTIMIZED / 10" | bc -l) (at \$10/mo average)"
echo "  - Scalable to 10x users without linear cost growth"
